category_sources: source_facts.description says htmltest is an HTML validator written in Go.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives htmltest; current_curation.display-name also gives htmltest.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo point to the official GitHub project; README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies HTML validation; source_facts.executables lists a CLI executable; source_facts.package-manager shows Go-based package availability context.
